_comment_runtime: Run via the playbook-symlinked source dir. The .venv path resolves after `uv sync` inside the bundle dir; the README documents that bootstrap step. Until then, manual `pip install fastmcp` against system python3 is the fallback.
_comment_scope: Default --allowed-dir is the target project (resolved at install time). Home-wide access is an explicit opt-in: add another --allowed-dir entry pointing at $HOME or any path you want to expose. Wider scope is risky under prompt injection because the bundle also exposes passthrough write_file / create_directory / move_file tools.
